site.name: Azimuth North
site.author: Nick Vandam
site.description: Veteran-led consulting and AI implementation for small and mid-size business.

_notes: Single source of truth for the Library. 'published' + 'publishDate' drive the future drip-rotation: a scheduled Netlify build can flip 'published' to true once publishDate has arrived. Swap the scaffolded articles for real content; keep slugs URL-safe.

articles.title: Where AI Actually Saves SMB Hours — and Where It Just Demos Well
articles.metaDescription: A practical field guide for small and mid-size businesses: the tasks where AI reliably returns hours every week, and the ones where it quietly costs more than it saves.
articles.keywords: AI for small business, AI ROI, SMB automation, where AI saves time, practical AI implementation
articles.summary: The tasks worth automating first, the ones that quietly cost more than they save, and a simple test for telling them apart.

articles.title: The Swivel-Chair Tax: What Disconnected Systems Really Cost
articles.metaDescription: Re-keying the same data across disconnected tools never shows up on an invoice — yet it's one of the biggest hidden drags on a growing small or mid-size operation. Here's how to find it and remove it.
articles.keywords: systems integration, disconnected software, data re-entry cost, SMB operations, workflow automation
articles.summary: The hidden cost of re-keying data between tools that don't talk — and how to measure it before you fix it.
